original_statement: which version of windows server 2012 has the same file service limits as "foundation"?
mutated_statement: which version of that system does something like the same content limits as a basic one?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Edition paraphrase + Term substitution + Hedging/verb change: "Windows Server 2012" → "that system" (product name replaced by pronoun/generic) | "foundation" → "a basic one" (specific edition generalized) | "file service limits" → "content limits" (technical term replaced with vague alternative) | "has" → "does something like" (assertion turned into hedged paraphrase)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的日志可见，在 iteration 0 的 chain.thought 与 judge_thought 中，agent 直接将“basic one”解释为 Foundation 并断定 Essentials 与 Foundation 在“file services limit”上相同（“Explanation: The ‘basic one’ refers to Foundation... Therefore, Essentials is the version with similar content limits”）。日志中没有出现任何关于原问题模糊、不明确或需要澄清的表述，也未向用户反问或请求更多信息。agent 直接以自身假定为前提给出具体答案，表现出将变异问题视为清晰明确来处理，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
